item.title: Stress Test - Last-Reviewed Rule in Historical Knowledge
item.description: Stress Test: Last-Reviewed Rule in Historical Knowledge Testing: “Every note should have a last-reviewed date, updated on each review.

item.title: Stress Test - Knowledge Activation States in Medical Knowledge
item.description: Stress Test: Knowledge Activation States in Medical Knowledge Seed Rule Being Tested Rule: Track knowledge activation state separately from lifecycle stage — distinguish whether captured knowledge is ready for practical application.

item.title: Seed Stress Test - 5-1 Ratio in Parenting Knowledge Base
item.description: Seed Stress Test: 5:1 Personal-to-General Ratio in Parenting Knowledge Base Seed Rule Being Tested Rule: Apply the 5:1 personal-to-general knowledge ratio — capture insights, decisions, and experiences (personal) over restatable facts (general).

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Multi-Dish Meal Coordination
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Multi-Dish Meal Coordination Knowledge The Gap The current Seed handles individual procedural notes (recipes, techniques) well, but has limited guidance for knowledge about coordinating multiple interdependent dishes — a meal where timing, flavor balance, and resource managemen...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Knowledge Retrieval Patterns and Usage Tracking
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Knowledge Retrieval Patterns and Usage Tracking The ultimate test of a knowledge base is not what it contains, but what you actually retrieve from it.

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Competing Organizational Structures
item.description: Frontier Exploration - Competing Organizational Structures When the same knowledge can be organized in multiple valid ways, how should an AI agent choose? The Problem Some knowledge domains have no single “correct” organizational structure.

item.title: Seed Stress Test - Mathematics Knowledge Base
item.description: Seed Stress Test: Mathematics Knowledge Base Testing Seed rules against the demands of mathematical knowledge capture.

item.title: The Last Skill
item.description: The Last Skill The meta-skill that makes all others easier.

item.title: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed
item.description: AI-Assisted Knowledge Management Seed Drop this file into any vault to bootstrap a healthy, self-improving knowledge base.

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Knowledge Applicability Boundaries
item.description: Frontier Exploration - Knowledge Applicability Boundaries DEPRECATED: This note has been merged into Types of Applicability Boundaries.
